title: limonium jarmolenkoi
intro: Limonium jarmolenkoi, also known as the Lithuanian sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Limonium jarmolenkoi is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
